mapper.select:
SELECT id , MAX(email) AS email , MAX(password) AS password , MAX(status) AS status , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT R.role_code ORDER BY R.role_code SEPARATOR ', ') AS roleCodes FROM users U
LEFT JOIN user_role UR ON U.id= UR.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_roles R ON UR.role_id = R.id WHERE U.id = #{id} GROUP BY U.id
